4. Consistency: Your <reason> is consistent with your <player answer> and <newly proposed trade>. Your <message> also aligns with your move.
5. Rule compliance: You are respecting the proposal budget and turn constraints. You are not proposing a new trade after accepting, which is correct.
</critique>
